nasb.text: All the nations are as nothing before Him, They are regarded by Him as less than nothing and meaningless.

esv.text: All the nations are as nothing before him, they are accounted by him as less than nothing and emptiness.

cnv.text: 萬國在他跟前好像不存在， 在他看來，只是烏有和虛空。

ccb.text: 万国在祂面前都算不得什么， 在祂看来不过是虚无。

csbs.text: 万国在他面前如同无有， 在他看来，连虚无和虚空也算不上。
